_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: skfem poisson numerical-correctness gate. Mirrors fenics/poisson_mms_convergence. Runs the catalog-recommended skfem API surface (MeshTri.refined, Basis with ElementTriPk, BilinearForm + LinearForm, condense, solve) end-to-end against the manufactured solution u = sin(π·x)·sin(π·y), f = 2π²·sin(π·x)·sin(π·y) on [0,1]². Asserts P1 h=1/32 L2 error <= 5e-3, P2 <= 5e-5, P3 <= 5e-7, P1 EOC h=1/16 → h=1/32 in [1.7, 2.3]. CROSS-BACKEND NUMERICAL AGREEMENT with fenics: P1=1.31e-3 vs fenics P1=1.32e-3, P2=7.14e-6 vs fenics P2=7.14e-6 (identical to 4 sig figs), EOC=1.993 vs fenics 1.993. Verified against skfem 12.0.1 on 2026-06-01.
